name: QA 828
description:
PCP QA Test No. 828

Use valgrind to track down memory leaks associated with

pmDestroyContext().

See http://oss.sgi.com/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=1057



Copyright (c) 2014 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 828

Use valgrind to track down memory leaks associated with

pmDestroyContext().

See http://oss.sgi.com/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=1057

Copyright (c) 2014 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.
